title: Better Loot Tables
description: This mob improves Minecraft's loot tables by increasing drop amounts and adding more related drops to the loot table
body:
Better loot tables is designed to improve player experience while farming mobs, currently there are 8+ mobs that have been improved:

- zombie
- skeleton
- creeper
- spider
- enderman
- cod
- zombie villager
- turtle

These improvements range from improving already existing drops in the loot table to adding new drops to make farming the mob more useful.
